chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ أَكَلَ أَوْ شَرِبَ نَاسِياً فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – The one who eats or drinks out of forgetfulness during the Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/271)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/271)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ صَامَ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَأَكَلَ وَ شَرِبَ نَاسِياً قَالَ يُتِمُّ صَوْمَهُ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ قَضَاؤُهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who Fasts in the Month of Ramazan, so he eats and drinks out of forgetfulness. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Let him complete his Fast, and there is not making up for it upon him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah, who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who because of forgetfulness when fasting in the month of Ramadan eats and drinks. He (the Imam) said, ‘He is not required to complete its Qada’ (compensatory fast).”’
